FIFA World Cup 2026 Tournament Performance Analytics — every player, every match, every stat, from the group stage sand to the final whistle.

01 — Your data

Bring your own squad sheet

Drop a match-stats CSV here, or click to browse Expected columns: player_name, team, position, age, height_cm, weight_kg, goals, assists, player_rating… (same schema as the tournament dataset)

06 — Position predictor

What position fits these attributes?

A live k-nearest-neighbours model runs in your browser against the full player dataset — adjust the sliders and watch the prediction update.

Built for tournament analysis · Data is processed entirely in your browser — nothing is uploaded to a server.
